changelog: Full GUI rebuild — 1280x760, dark professional design
Account section at top of sidebar with avatar
Icon + text sidebar with section labels and badges
Full-area Play page with version picker and session info panel
Full-area Mods page with search, detail panel, enable/disable all
Launch button directly on versions list
New matching dark splash screen with progress ring
4 themes: Pure Black, Midnight, Nord, Deep Space
RAM usage bar in sidebar footer
